hooks.command:
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '.*/docs/[^/]+\.md$'; then DOCPATH="/docs/$(basename "$FILE")"; CLAUDE_MD="/Users/hemanthkumargullipalli/liftingdiarycourse/CLAUDE.md"; if ! grep -qF "$DOCPATH" "$CLAUDE_MD"; then python3 -c "
import re, sys
content = open('$CLAUDE_MD').read()
lines = content.split('\n')
last = -1
for i, l in enumerate(lines):
    if re.match(r'- /docs/', l):
        last = i
if last >= 0:
    lines.insert(last + 1, '- $DOCPATH')
    open('$CLAUDE_MD', 'w').write('\n'.join(lines))
    print('Added $DOCPATH to CLAUDE.md')
"; fi; fi
